title: Welcome to NeoMind
welcomeMessage: Let's set up your Edge AI platform. This will only take a few minutes.
accountDescription: This account will have full access to manage the system.
passwordComplexity: Password must contain both letters and numbers
llmDescription: Choose your AI provider. We recommend Ollama for local use.
apiKeyHint: Your API key is stored securely and never shared.
completeMessage: Your NeoMind platform is ready to use.
subscribeNewsletter: Subscribe to Camthink newsletter for product updates and new features
quickChatDesc: Chat with AI to explore NeoMind capabilities
quickLlmDesc: Set up Ollama, OpenAI, or other LLM providers
quickExploreDesc: Discover devices, automation, and more features
